content: pytest-httpx 0.36.2 (latest, maintained by Colin-b). Core fixture: httpx_mock injected as pytest parameter. add_response(url=, method=, json=, status_code=, match_json=, match_headers=, is_optional=, is_reusable=). add_exception(httpx.ReadTimeout(...)) for error simulation. Works transparently with both sync/async httpx clients. With asyncio_mode=auto (already in pyproject.toml), async tests work with plain async def test_*. Default behavior: all registered responses must be requested and all requests must be expected (assertion on teardown). Override with @pytest.mark.httpx_mock(assert_all_responses_were_requested=False).
